title: Project Wizard, After Project Wizard
description:
Project Wizard, After Project Wizard

After Project Wizard

After the wizard finishes, the [Finish] button will be enabled. Click the [Finish] button and create a new project.

After
	 clicking [Finish], SPEL+ program code and related objects are automatically
	 generated for a new project.

Press
	 F5 to run the new program. Use caution when running a program that
	 moves the robot.

You
	 can make changes to the generated program to refine operation to suit
	 customer's needs.
